items: a minimum of 360° rotation, where the straddle position must still be in a spinning. Rotation is considered from the point where there is no contact with the floor and includes the moment where the straddle position is fixed.
reverse spin starting with one hand on the pole, bottom hand releases and then re-grips the pole while turning the body into a Pole Straddle Split Grip position without making contact with the floor
in a stag position followed by straddle position, where both legs are fully extended and feet in line or above the hips
upright, general shape of body position of Body Spiral Reverse Grab and Pole Straddle Split Grip apply (refer to ST10 with a 20° tolerance on the leg position, and S5)
